content: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><bpmn:definitions xmlns:bpmn="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL" xmlns:uipath="http://uipath.org/schema/bpmn" targetNamespace="http://uipath.com/synthetic/maestro-bpmn/operate-diagnose"><bpmn:process id="Process_InvoiceTriage" isExecutable="true"><bpmn:startEvent id="Start_Manual"/><bpmn:serviceTask id="Task_InvokeLegacyRpa" name="Invoke legacy RPA"><bpmn:extensionElements><uipath:activity service="Orchestrator.StartJob"><uipath:binding name="folderPath" expression="=bindings.LegacyRpaFolder"/></uipath:activity></bpmn:extensionElements></bpmn:serviceTask><bpmn:endEvent id="End_Done"/></bpmn:process></bpmn:definitions>
